mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id AS id, o.order_number AS orderNo, o.status, o.initiator_id AS buyerId, o.initiator_good_id AS buyerItemId, o.receiver_id AS sellerId, o.receiver_good_id AS sellerItemId, o.exchange_code AS exchangeCode, o.remark, o.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, o.admin_note AS adminNote, o.created_at AS createTime, o.updated_at AS updateTime, o.completed_at AS completeTime, o.cancelled_at AS cancelTime, o.deleted_at AS deletedAt, o.initiator_confirmed AS initiatorConfirmed, o.receiver_confirmed AS receiverConfirmed, o.initiator_review AS initiatorReview, o.initiator_review_images AS initiatorReviewImages, o.receiver_review AS receiverReview, o.receiver_review_images AS receiverReviewImages, u1.username AS buyerName, u1.real_name AS buyerRealName, u1.avatar_url AS buyerAvatar, u1.phone AS buyerPhone, u1.address AS buyerAddress, u1.school AS buyerSchool, u2.username AS sellerName, u2.real_name AS sellerRealName, u2.avatar_url AS sellerAvatar, u2.phone AS sellerPhone, u2.address AS sellerAddress, u2.school AS sellerSchool, g1.good_name AS buyerItemName, g1.description AS buyerItemDescription, g1.images AS buyerItemImages, g2.good_name AS sellerItemName, g2.description AS sellerItemDescription, g2.images AS sellerItemImages FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u1 ON o.initiator_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON o.receiver_id = u2.user_id LEFT JOIN goods g1 ON o.initiator_good_id = g1.good_id LEFT JOIN goods g2 ON o.receiver_good_id = g2.good_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id AS id, o.order_number AS orderNo, o.status, o.initiator_id AS buyerId, o.initiator_good_id AS buyerItemId, o.receiver_id AS sellerId, o.receiver_good_id AS sellerItemId, o.exchange_code AS exchangeCode, o.remark, o.cancel_reason AS cancelReason, o.admin_note AS adminNote, o.created_at AS createTime, o.updated_at AS updateTime, o.completed_at AS completeTime, o.cancelled_at AS cancelTime, o.deleted_at AS deletedAt, o.initiator_confirmed AS initiatorConfirmed, o.receiver_confirmed AS receiverConfirmed, o.initiator_review AS initiatorReview, o.initiator_review_images AS initiatorReviewImages, o.receiver_review AS receiverReview, o.receiver_review_images AS receiverReviewImages, u1.username AS buyerName, u1.real_name AS buyerRealName, u1.avatar_url AS buyerAvatar, u1.phone AS buyerPhone, u1.address AS buyerAddress, u1.school AS buyerSchool, u2.username AS sellerName, u2.real_name AS sellerRealName, u2.avatar_url AS sellerAvatar, u2.phone AS sellerPhone, u2.address AS sellerAddress, u2.school AS sellerSchool, g1.good_name AS buyerItemName, g1.description AS buyerItemDescription, g1.images AS buyerItemImages, g2.good_name AS sellerItemName, g2.description AS sellerItemDescription, g2.images AS sellerItemImages FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u1 ON o.initiator_id = u1.user_id LEFT JOIN users u2 ON o.receiver_id = u2.user_id LEFT JOIN goods g1 ON o.initiator_good_id = g1.good_id LEFT JOIN goods g2 ON o.receiver_good_id = g2.good_id WHERE o.deleted_at IS NULL
AND o.status = #{status}
AND (o.order_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.admin_note LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
